title: Token scripting: upgrade script mid-load + convergence
description: Add a scenario that upgrades token script while transfers are ongoing (or between ramp steps). Acceptance: after settle, all nodes agree on hasScript/script behavior + customState evolution; no permanent divergence.
notes:
RUN_ID=token_script_upgrade_mid_load-20260303-104321

Added scenario token_script_upgrade_mid_load: installs script A, runs transfer load, upgrades to script B mid-run, then asserts ping tag convergence + hook-count customState convergence across nodes + cross-node balance consistency.

Artifacts: better_testing/runs/<RUN_ID>/token_script_upgrade_mid_load.summary.json (+ .timeseries.jsonl).

title: Token scripting: deterministic rejects across nodes
description: Extend/validate token_script_rejects: intentionally invalid scripted tx is rejected consistently across nodes (same error class), and state unchanged; include a valid tx before/after. Acceptance: settle + script view agree across nodes.
notes:
RUN_ID=token_script_rejects-20260303-102100

Updated token_script_rejects to: embed threshold in default script + robust BigInt parsing; assert token.callView(getThreshold) equals expected on every node; broadcast invalid oversized transfer to every node and assert identical amount-too-large signature + no state change; valid transfers before/after.

Docs: better_testing/README.md updated.

title: pr-bug-2
description:
The issue below was found during a code review. Follow the provided context and guidance below and implement a solution

## Issue description
`applyMutations` can create negative balances/totalSupply because it applies bigint arithmetic without invariant checks.

## Issue Context
Scripts can emit arbitrary mutations via hooks, so this is reachable in normal execution.

## Fix Focus Areas
- src/libs/scripting/index.ts[38-64]
- src/libs/scripting/index.ts[271-309]
close_reason: Add invariant checks to applyMutations (no negative balances/totalSupply, no non-positive amounts)

close_reason: Removed phase/progress checklist; make doc informational (tracking in beads)

close_reason: Disable TypeORM synchronize by default in production

title: Fix manageNodeCall token reads to use initialized Datasource
close_reason: Use Datasource.getInstance() for token nodeCalls so repositories are initialized

title: pr-bug-1
description:
The issue below was found during a code review. Follow the provided context and guidance below and implement a solution

## Issue description
Holder-pointer maintenance only updates pointers for the primary operation participants, but scripts can emit additional mutations affecting other addresses.

## Issue Context
This breaks `GCRMain.extended.tokens` as an index of token holders.

## Fix Focus Areas
- src/libs/scripting/index.ts[271-309]
- src/libs/blockchain/gcr/gcr_routines/GCRTokenRoutines.ts[492-514]
close_reason: Update holder pointers for all addresses affected by script-emitted mutations (not just from/to)

title: Fix token caller spoofing (edit.account must match tx signer)
close_reason: Reject token edits when edit.account != tx.content.from

title: pr-bug-3
description:
The issue below was found during a code review. Follow the provided context and guidance below and implement a solution

## Issue description
`batchDownloadBlocks` inserts blocks with `persistTransactions` effectively enabled (default), which can cause `HandleGCR.applyToTx()` to skip edits for txs that were in the local mempool.

## Issue Context
The PR already documents and fixes this exact failure mode in `syncBlock`, but the batch sync path still uses the older call form.

## Fix Focus Areas
- src/libs/blockchain/routines/Sync.ts[531-551]
- src/libs/blockchain/chain.ts[342-406]
- src/libs/blockchain/gcr/handleGCR.ts[330-342]
close_reason: Batch sync path now inserts blocks with persistTransactions=false (avoid skipping GCR apply for txs seen in mempool)

title: Make token hook context deterministic (timestamps + prevBlockHash)
close_reason: Removed Date.now/empty prevBlockHash from hook contexts; made ACL+upgrade timestamps deterministic
